title: Blukar Head Torch Rechargeable, Super Bright COB Headlamp Headlight with Sensor Control & Red Lights, 8 Light Modes, Spotlight Floodlight Combination, Waterproof, Long Battery Life for Work,Emergency
features: 【Super Bright & Stepless Dimmable】Blukar headlamp adopts advanced COB technology and super bright XPG LED technology, the beam is uniform and stable, brighter than ordinary headlamps and has a wider beam range. It can meet the lighting needs of two different scenes of spotlight and floodlight at the same time, so that you can see your surroundings more clearly. Unique continuous dimming function, the brightness can be adjusted from 100% to 30% by long pressing the button.

【8 Lighting Modes & Motion Sensor】5 regular lighting modes: XPG White Light-COB White Light-XPG+COB White Light-COB Red Light-COB Red Light SOS. In this mode, if there is no operation within 8 seconds, you can short press the switch button to turn off the light directly; 3 induction lighting modes: XPG white light-COB white light-XPG+COB white light. In the induction mode, wave your hand within 15 cm in front of the headlight to turn on or off the light, freeing your hands and saving effort.

【USB C Rechargeable & IPX5 Waterproof】Equipped with 1200mAh large-capacity battery, can provide long battery life, easily rechargeable via USB C. The powerful headlamp can support long time outdoor activities when fully charged, giving you longer lighting time and easier charging experience, (USB C cable included). This headlamp also has an IPX5 waterproof rating, making it safe to use in rainy or snowy weather, indoors or outdoors. It's an ideal choice for outdoor enthusiasts.

【Adjustable & Comfortable】This headlamp can be adjusted at 45°, compact, lightweight and portable, good fixation and comfortable to wear, can effectively avoid shaking and sliding during operation, to meet your multi-angle lighting needs. At the same time, the elastic headband can also be adjusted according to different head circumferences, suitable for a variety of head shape.

【IPX5 Waterproof & Multipurpose】IPX5 waterproof rating, with good waterproof and dustproof performance, lightweight and easy to carry, no need to worry when encountering rain or snow and other environments. This headlamp is not only suitable for indoor work, but also for complex and diverse outdoor environments, ideal for various activities, such as fishing, biking, camping, hiking, DIY, adventure, reading, car repair, emergency lighting, etc.
